prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 仅有2023年浙江省综合类最低位次约20235名，作为最近可用基准位次；2023年浙江省招生 计划24人，2026年招生计划同为24人，计划人数持平，无扩缩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校，军事类院校；软科主榜未进入前200名，整体层次处于中上水平。抖音热度排名第9（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；第五。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学等医学类专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年临床医学推荐、 护理推荐），医学类专业整体报考竞争加剧；浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人（普通高考），较2025年29.08万人大幅增加约37.5%，竞争明显加剧；海军军医大学位于上海，与浙江省毗邻，地域偏好有利于浙江考生报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2023年基准位 次20235名、招生计划持平、浙江省考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及医学类专业持续高热、抖音高热度等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将小幅后移。预测最低位次约20640名 ，区间20140–21140名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（高级临床医师）
- 麻醉学（临床麻醉医师）
- 医学影像学（临床影像医师）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（临床医师）
- 中医学（中医临床医师）
- 中药学（药剂师）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物技术
- 药学（药剂师）
- 护理学（护师）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间20140–21140名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如20000名以内）可重点冲刺临床医学（高级临床医师 ）等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限则优先考虑三档专业确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Only the 2023 Zhejiang comprehensive minimum ranking of approximately 20235 is available as the most recent baseline ranking; the 2023 Zhejiang enrollment plan was 24 students, and the 2026 enrollment plan is also 24 students, with the plan remaining unchanged, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university, military academy; not in the top 200 on the Soft Science main ranking, overall level is upper-middle. Ranked 9th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting relatively high application attention; no obvious gaps in admission records; fifth.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as clinical medicine have consistently high social popularity (2024 clinical medicine recommendation, nursing recommendation), overall competition for medical majors is intensifying; the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000 (general college entrance examination), a significant increase of about 37.5% compared to 290,800 in 2025, competition significantly intensifies; Naval Medical University is located in Shanghai, adjacent to Zhejiang Province, regional preference is favorable for Zhejiang candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2023 baseline ranking of 20235, unchanged enrollment plan, significant increase in total candidates in Zhejiang Province (intensified competition), sustained high popularity of medical majors, and high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 20640, range 20140–21140.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Senior Clinical Physician)
- Anesthesiology (Clinical Anesthesiologist)
- Medical Imaging (Clinical Imaging Physician).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (Clinical Physician)
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM Clinical Physician)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Pharmacist).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biotechnology
- Pharmacy (Pharmacist)
- Nursing (Nurse).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 20140–21140, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 20000), focus on aiming for flagship majors like Clinical Medicine (Senior Clinical Physician); if ranking is near the upper limit of the range, prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
